message:
fix: use /tmp for tmux socket paths instead of os.TempDir()

On macOS, os.TempDir() returns /var/folders/.../T/ but tmux always
creates sockets under /tmp/tmux-<uid>/. This caused findTestSockets()
to scan the wrong directory (always returning empty) and status socket
path resolution to point to a nonexistent file.

Closes: gt-qz93

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
